role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification (Hangul) and language context.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Ginkgo, Pine) and their regional relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards, road markings, and signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features like construction fencing styles and paving patterns.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided concrete evidence, and correctly identified the primary visual cue (Hangul). The tournament logic correctly used this cue to eliminate non-Korean candidates and then used secondary infrastructure cues to distinguish between North and South Korea.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Hangul characters on the stone.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the hilly terrain and autumn foliage.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified Ginkgo and pine species visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the green fencing and paving stones.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly observed the specific style of the construction screening and stairs.
